prompt: Create a whimsical, high-quality fantasy portrait of a young girl styled like Alice in Wonderland reclining in an oversized green leaf boat floating down a narrow, gently curving blue stream. She has long blonde wavy hair with a blue bow headband and wears a blue puff-sleeve dress with a white apron, layered white ruffled skirt, pink shoes, and mismatched thigh-high striped stockings: one blue-and-white stripe and one pink-and-white stripe. The leaf boat is shaped like a curled natural leaf with a raised stem at the back, glossy veins, and pointed bow, padded with soft pastel pillows in pale blue, pink, and yellow. The girl lies relaxed with her arms resting along the sides of the leaf and her legs extended toward the pointed tip, drifting diagonally through the frame from lower left toward upper right. Surround the stream with lush bright green mossy banks, rounded hedges, large storybook trees, and colorful oversized flowers in pink, purple, blue, yellow, and orange. The water should be rich teal-blue with small ripples, foam, and sparkling highlights around the leaf boat. Use a dreamy fairytale garden atmosphere, vibrant saturated colors, shallow depth of field, soft bokeh background, cinematic composition, realistic 3D storybook illustration style, detailed textures on the leaf, fabric, water, and flowers, vertical portrait orientation, magical and serene mood.
